summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DreamerZ_Beta AI Training web application. All backend APIs passing (100%), frontend fully functional with all key features operational including the new curriculum data integration.
passed_tests: Backend /api/ root endpoint returns correct message and version
Backend /api/health endpoint returns healthy status
Backend /api/status POST creates status check
Backend /api/status GET retrieves status checks
Backend /api/ai endpoint works with all modes (default, prompt_lab_base, prompt_lab_context, prompt_lab_constraints)
Backend safety filters block unsafe content
Backend rate limiting allows normal requests
Backend CORS preflight requests work
Landing page renders with hero section, stats (5 AI Tools, 20+ Modules, 100% Free)
Landing page CTA buttons (Start Learning Free, Try Prompt Lab) visible and functional
Tools page displays all 5 tool cards (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Canva, Syllaby)
Tools page shows correct XP values and module counts for each tool
Tools page progress stats (Complete %, XP Earned) visible
Tool Journey page loads modules correctly (8 modules for ChatGPT)
Tool Journey module content displays Learn, Example, Activity sections
Quiz functionality works - selecting answers, submitting, showing correct/incorrect feedback
Quiz completion shows 'Well Done!' message with confetti animation
Progress tracking saves to localStorage (dreamerz_beta_progress_v1)
Curriculum page shows searchable list of all 28 modules
Curriculum search and filter functionality works
Prompt Lab stage tabs have proper data-testid attributes (stage-base, stage-context, stage-constraints)
Prompt Lab all 3 stages work correctly with progressive input fields
Prompt Lab Load Example button populates all fields
Prompt Lab AI integration returns real responses (not demo mode)
Navigation between all pages works correctly (/, /tools, /tools/chatgpt, /prompt-lab, /curriculum, /parents)
Parents page loads with safety information
seed_data_creation: None required - app uses localStorage for progress tracking
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. The curriculum.js file has been converted from TypeScript to JavaScript and integrated properly. Prompt Lab stage tabs now have data-testid attributes. AI integration uses Emergent LLM Key and returns real responses. Progress is stored in localStorage with key 'dreamerz_beta_progress_v1'. The app has 5 AI tools with 28 total modules.
mocked_api_note: The /api/ai endpoint has a demo mode fallback that returns hardcoded responses if EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is not available. Currently using real AI responses (not demo mode).
